note: Replaced exec.CommandContext with exec.Command + Setpgid:true + Start/goroutine/select pattern. On context cancellation, killValidationCommandProcessGroup sends SIGKILL to -cmd.Process.Pid (the entire process group), so foreground child commands spawned by sh are also terminated. New platform-specific files gate_unix.go / gate_windows.go follow the same pattern as agents/process_unix.go and agents/process_windows.go.
